name: Mina
summary: Young female dance creator with a confident, expressive, performance-first identity. She fits solo choreography, dance tutorials, rehearsal clips, mirror practice, and stylish short-form dance content.
visual_features: clear skin and balanced facial lighting
content_preferences: practice sessions with clear body visibility
short-form trend dances with one main subject
substitution_constraints: prefer one clearly dominant performer in frame
face should be visible for meaningful portions of the clip
upper body or full body should stay visible for choreography continuity
camera motion and scene cuts should still allow stable replacement
lighting should keep facial structure readable during movement
avoid: large crews or partner dance where no clear main subject exists
helmets, masks, or heavy face occlusion
extreme strobe lighting or rapid montage edits
contact-heavy choreography that hides the subject
themes far from dance, movement, or performance content
